changes.summary: When updating a function-type integration action, creates or updates the action draft with current integration_id, name, category, secure, contract, and config before uploading the function zip from function_config.file_path.
Retries when the function zip ID is not immediately available after upload, reducing transient apply failures.
Retrieves the latest draft version before publishing, reducing version-mismatch errors during apply.
Function zip uploads send an explicit content length instead of chunked transfer encoding, improving upload reliability.
